title: Max Payne: Perdition
overview: In this fan film reimagining the events after Max Payne 2, ex-NYPD Detective Max Payne has avenged his loved ones but now struggles with suicidal thoughts and alcoholism. Hunted by a mysterious figure from his past, Payne has only one night to come to terms with his past and himself.
